tagline: Self-hosted file sharing with a modern web interface
description:
Pingvin-Share is a self-hosted file sharing application compatible with Nextcloud apps, offering a modern and intuitive web interface. It enables users to securely store, organize, and share files without relying on external cloud services. The application supports multiple authentication methods and provides features such as share links, user accounts, and a responsive interface.

**Key features:**
- Modern, responsive web interface
- User accounts with a permission system
- Secure share links for files
- Drag-and-drop file upload
- Password-protected shares
- Multiple authentication methods
- Docker-based deployment for easy installation

**Learn more:**
- [Pingvin-Share GitHub](https://github.com/stonith404/pingvin-share)
author: stonith404

releaseNotes.en_US:
- Latest upstream release v1.13.0 adds support for using Redis cache instead of memory cache.
- The backend can now define the path to the config file.
releaseNotes.en_GB:
- Latest upstream release v1.13.0 adds support for using Redis cache instead of memory cache.
- The backend can now define the path to the config file.
releaseNotes.it_IT:
- L'ultima versione upstream v1.13.0 aggiunge il supporto per l'utilizzo della cache Redis anziché della cache di memoria.
- Il backend ora può definire il percorso del file di configurazione.
releaseNotes.nb_NO:
- Siste oppstrømsutgivelse v1.13.0 legger til støtte for bruk av Redis-cache i stedet for minnebuffer.
- Bakenden kan nå definere banen til konfigurasjonsfilen.
releaseNotes.zh_CN:

- 后端现在可以定义 config file 路径。
releaseNotes.ja_JP:
- upstream の最新リリース v1.13.0 は、memory cache の代わりに Redis cache を使うサポートを追加します。
- backend で config file のパスを定義できるようになりました。
releaseNotes.ko_KR:
- upstream 최신 릴리스 v1.13.0은 memory cache 대신 Redis cache를 사용하는 기능을 추가합니다.
- backend에서 config file 경로를 정의할 수 있게 되었습니다.
releaseNotes.fr_FR:
- La derniere release upstream v1.13.0 ajoute la prise en charge du cache Redis a la place du cache memoire.
- Le backend peut maintenant definir le chemin du config file.
releaseNotes.de_DE:
- Das aktuelle upstream Release v1.13.0 ergaenzt Unterstuetzung fuer Redis Cache statt Memory Cache.
- Das Backend kann nun den Pfad zur config file definieren.
releaseNotes.sv_SE:
- Senaste uppströmsversionen v1.13.0 lägger till stöd för att använda Redis-cache istället för minnescache.
- Backend kan nu definiera sökvägen till konfigurationsfilen.
releaseNotes.el_GR:
- Η τελευταία ανοδική έκδοση v1.13.0 προσθέτει υποστήριξη για τη χρήση της προσωρινής μνήμης Redis αντί της κρυφής μνήμης.
- Το backend μπορεί τώρα να ορίσει τη διαδρομή προς το αρχείο ρυθμίσεων.
releaseNotes.hr_HR:

- Pozadina sada može definirati put do konfiguracijske datoteke.
releaseNotes.pt_PT:
- A versão upstream mais recente v1.13.0 adiciona suporte para utilizar a cache Redis em vez da cache de memória.
- O backend pode agora definir o caminho para o ficheiro de configuração.
releaseNotes.ru_RU:
- В последнем выпуске основной разработки v1.13.0 добавлена ​​поддержка использования кэша Redis вместо кэша памяти.
- Серверная часть теперь может определять путь к файлу конфигурации.
releaseNotes.tr_TR:

- Arka uç artık yapılandırma dosyasının yolunu tanımlayabilir.
